data.description: CHINA'S FINAL CAPITAL AND FINANCIAL ACCOUNT DEFICIT FOR 2025 REACHED $773.5 BILLION, UP FROM A PRELIMINARY DEFICIT OF $760.2 BILLION, ACCORDING TO THE FX REGULATOR.

data.title: Hainan Daily Press Group, Malaysia's Nanyang Siang Pau Jointly Release ASEAN Investment Survey as Hainan FTP Marks 100 Days of Special Customs Operations
data.description: In Haikou, China, a recent report from the Hainan International Media Center revealed that more than 70% of ASEAN businesses surveyed identify Hainan as a crucial "transit or re-export platform" to access the Chinese mainland market. The joint report highlights the strategic significance of Hainan for these enterprises, showcasing its potential as a gateway for market entry.

data.title: ALGO price may retest $0.09 as it trades at $0.08 with bearish signals. Analysis hints at rebound if support holds.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Algorand is currently trading at $0.08 as bearish momentum signals persist. Technical analysis indicates a possible rebound to $0.09 resistance if the current support levels remain strong.

data.title: Injective (INJ) aims for $3.26 rebound amid bearish trends; Short-term target: $3.05, Medium-term: $3.20-$3.26, with key support at $2.88.
data.description: Predictions for INJ's price include a short-term target of $3.05 within one week and a medium-term forecast in the range of $3.20 to $3.26 over one month. A bullish breakout is expected at $3.26, while critical support is identified at $2.88.

data.title: ARK Invest partners with Kalshi to utilize their data for investment decisions, focusing on markets like non-farm payroll and deficit-to-GDP ratio markets.
data.description: Kalshi has identified certain markets of interest to ARK Invest, including non-farm payroll markets and deficit-to-GDP ratio markets.

data.title: Borregaard ASA: Proxies for the Annual General Meeting 16 April 2026
data.description: Ahead of Borregaard's Annual General Meeting, Mr. Helge Aasen, Chair of the Board of Directors in Borregaard ASA, has been granted voting rights for 7,906,608 shares in the company through proxies. These proxies are specific to the Annual General Meeting scheduled for April 16, 2026. As a result, Mr. Helge Aasen now holds voting power over 7.9% of the total outstanding shares in Borregaard ASA.
Annual General Meeting scheduled in cBrain A/S.
